content.rendered:
Do you dream of becoming a professional chef, baker, or event caterer by enrolling in a food and catering Course? Our food and catering course programmes at Global Technical College are designed to give you practical, hands-on training that blends creativity with professional skills. Whether you want to run your own catering business or simply master cookery and baking, we’ve got the perfect course for you.

Why Choose Our Food and Catering Course?

  • Hands-on training with professional chefs and instructors
  • Affordable tuition with flexible payment options
  • Short, practical courses designed for quick career entry
  • Ideal for both beginners and aspiring professionals
  • Certification upon completion

Practical Cookery

Master the art of preparing delicious meals for any occasion with our professional cookery course.

  • Duration: 2 months
  • Tuition: KES 36,000 per term

Learn food preparation, cooking methods, and presentation.
Ideal for students seeking careers in catering and hospitality.
Gain practical kitchen experience.

Cake Making & Decoration

Turn your creativity into edible art by learning cake baking and decorating techniques.

  • Duration: 2 months
  • Tuition: KES 36,000 per term

Learn baking basics, icing, and advanced cake decoration.
Perfect for aspiring bakers or small business start-ups.
Showcase your skills with professional cake designs.

Kids Cake Making (Weekend & Holiday Classes)A fun and engaging introduction to baking for children during weekends and school holidays.

  • Tuition: KES 5,000 (per course)

Hands-on cake making for kids.
Builds creativity and confidence.
A safe, fun, and educational experience.

Tuition Fees at a Glance

Start Your Culinary Journey Today

Whether you’re preparing for a career in hospitality or simply want to sharpen your skills in the kitchen, our food and catering course options give you everything you need to succeed. From cookery to cake artistry, you’ll graduate with skills that open doors.
